segments.text: I revealed Myself to those who did not ask for Me; I was found by those who did not seek Me. [^232] To a nation that did not call My name, I said, ‘Here I am! Here I am!’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: All day long I have held out My handsto an obstinate people[^233] who walk in the wrong path, who follow their own imaginations,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
to a people who continually provoke Me to My face, sacrificing in the gardens
and burning incense on altars of brick,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: sitting among the graves, spending nights in secret places, eating the meat of pigs and polluted broth from their bowls.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They say, ‘Keep to yourself; do not come near me, for I am holier than you!’Such people are smoke in My nostrils, a fire that burns all day long.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Behold, it is written before Me: I will not keep silent, but I will repay; 
I will pay it back into their laps,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: both for your iniquities and for those of your fathers,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the LORD.
Because they burned incense on the mountains and scorned Me on the hills, I will measure into their lapsfull payment for their former deeds.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: This is what the LORD says:
As the new wine is found in a cluster of grapes, and men say, ‘Do not destroy it, for it contains a blessing,’so I will act on behalf of My servants; I will not destroy them all.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: And I will bring forth descendants from Jacob, and heirs from Judah; My elect will possess My mountains, [^234] and My servants will dwell there.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
Sharon will become a pasture for flocks, and the Valley of Achor a resting place for herds, 
for My people who seek Me.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: But you who forsake the LORD, who forget My holy mountain, who set a table for Fortune[^235] and fill bowls of mixed wine for Destiny, [^236]
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I will destine you for the sword, and you will all kneel down to be slaughtered, because I called and you did not answer, I spoke and you did not listen; you did evil in My sight and chose that in which I did not delight.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Therefore this is what the Lord GOD says:
My servants will eat, but you will go hungry; My servants will drink, but you will go thirsty; My servants will rejoice, but you will be put to shame.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text:
My servants will shout for joy with a glad heart, but you will cry out with a heavy heart
and wail with a broken spirit.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: You will leave behind your nameas a curse for My chosen ones, and the Lord GOD will slay you; but to His servants He will give another name.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text:
Whoever invokes a blessing in the landwill do so by the God of truth, and whoever takes an oath in the landwill swear by the God of truth. For the former troubles will be forgotten and hidden from My sight. 

## A New Heaven and a New Earth
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: For behold, I will createnew heavens and a new earth. [^237] The former things will not be remembered, nor will they come to mind.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: But be glad and rejoice foreverin what I create; for I will create Jerusalem to be a joy and its people to be a delight.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: I will rejoice in Jerusalem and take delight in My people. The sounds of weeping and cryingwill no longer be heard in her.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text:
No longer will a nursing infant live but a few days, or an old man fail to live out his years. For the youth will die at a hundred years, and he who fails to reach a hundred
will be considered accursed.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: They will build houses and dwell in them; they will plant vineyards and eat their fruit.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: No longer will they build houses for others to inhabit, nor plant for others to eat. For as is the lifetime of a tree, so will be the days of My people, and My chosen ones will fully enjoythe work of their hands.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: They will not labor in vainor bear children doomed to disaster; for they will be a people blessed by the LORD—they and their descendants with them.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: Even before they call, I will answer, and while they are still speaking, I will hear.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text:
The wolf and the lamb will feed together, and the lion will eat straw like the ox, but the food of the serpent[^238] will be dust. They will neither harm nor destroy
on all My holy mountain,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the LORD.
